# BEResponderEditActions

**Protocol**

A set of methods that defines extended interactions in browser text views.

## Declaration

```swift
protocol BEResponderEditActions : UIResponderStandardEditActions
```

## Overview

Implement the methods in this protocol to support text interactions in your browser text view that conforms to [doc://com.apple.BrowserEngineKit/documentation/BrowserEngineKit/BETextInput]. To get the operating system’s standard behavior for an interaction, call [doc://com.apple.BrowserEngineKit/documentation/BrowserEngineKit/BETextInteraction] methods in your implementation. For more information, see [doc://com.apple.BrowserEngineKit/documentation/BrowserEngineKit/support-extended-text-interactions].

## Finding and replacing text

- **findSelected(_:)**: Begins a search for the selected content in your browser text view.
- **promptForReplace(_:)**: Shows potential replacements for the selected content.
- **replace(_:)**: Removes the selected text and inputs the chosen replacement text.
- **addShortcut(_:)**: Adds a text-replacement shortcut to the edit dictionary.

## Defining and sharing text

- **lookup(_:)**: Presents a dictionary definition for the selected content.
- **share(_:)**: Presents UI for sharing the selected text.

## Translating and transliterating text

- **translate(_:)**: Presents a translation of the selected text.
- **transliterateChinese(_:)**: Converts the selected text between traditional and simplified Chinese.

## Interaction responses

- **BETextInteraction**: An interaction you add to a text view to support extended text gestures.
- **BETextInteractionDelegate**: A set of methods that informs you about selection changes in text views.
- **BEGestureType**

## Inherits From

- NSObjectProtocol
- UIResponderStandardEditActions

## Inherited By

- BETextInput
